structured_output_unconstrained_str_FIND.text: {"verdict":"poor","reason":"The reply is overly simplistic and lacks context. While restarting a VPN client can sometimes resolve issues, the response doesn't ask for clarification about the specific problem, doesn't explain why this might help, and doesn't offer alternative solutions if the restart doesn't work. It's a generic one-liner that may not address the user's actual issue.","rule_triggered":"lack of context and thoroughness"}

structured_output.text: {"verdict":"needs_review","reason":"The reply is extremely brief and provides only a single troubleshooting step without any context, explanation, or follow-up. While restarting a VPN client is a legitimate and common troubleshooting step, the response lacks grounding (no acknowledgment of the user's issue) and is minimally helpful as it doesn't explain why this might help, what to do if it doesn't work, or ask clarifying questions about the problem.","rule_triggered":null}
structured_output.schema_note: verdict is Literal[pass,fail,needs_review] -> JSON-schema enum; API constrains vocabulary
